profile.name: Gurinder Singh
profile.title: Staff iOS & AI/ML Engineer
profile.tagline: LLM Agents · RAG Pipelines · Mobile · Automation · Patent Holder

highlights.description: AI-Powered Agentic E-Commerce Platform — lead engineer managing 2 new hires. Built merchant knowledge graph with GraphRAG for Ads Intelligence. Implemented MCP multi-agent orchestration.
Built payment-splitting integration for $400M partnership deal
Key stakeholder driving hypergrowth through merchant integrations
Led moonshot initiative winning $60M CVS contract for contactless payments
Built sandbox/integration app in two days for partnership launch
Led successful delivery of mission-critical feature set
Filed 'Interface Widget Tool for Automatic QR Code Generation'. First team to use SwiftUI for iOS widgets at Venmo. Reduced user friction by 66%

highlights.project: Dynamic Island / Live Activities / App Clip
highlights.description: Built end-to-end infrastructure for modern iOS features
CTE program curriculum: VR, ML, IoT, mobile dev, web dev, blockchain

experience.title: Software Engineer, Consultant for Google Stadia

highlights.description: Flutter/iOS development, Core Bluetooth integration for Stadia controller

projects.title: Flow
projects.description: Dynamic Island iOS app — beautiful, recent, uniquely Apple
projects.longDescription: A uniquely Apple-focused iOS application leveraging the Dynamic Island for a beautiful and intuitive user experience. Demonstrates advanced modern iOS development featuring rich animations and system integration.

projects.title: Ethereal Dimension
projects.description: AI storytelling platform — creative flagship project
projects.longDescription: A cutting-edge storytelling platform that combines interactive narratives with immersive digital experiences. Features original stories showcasing advanced web technologies and creative AI storytelling.

projects.title: Zai Vision Suite
projects.description: Multi-platform AI vision suite utilizing GLM-4.6V
projects.longDescription: An advanced multi-platform AI vision suite that leverages the GLM-4.6V model for visual understanding and processing. Serves as a major AI/ML showcase for computer vision capabilities.

projects.title: AI IDE Setup & Workflows
projects.description: Optimized development environment configurations for AI pairs
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive collection of dotfiles, scripts, and MCP server configurations designed to maximize productivity when pair programming with AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.

projects.title: Rosicrucian Knowledge Explorer
projects.description: RAG search engine exploring esoteric knowledge
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated search engine using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to explore complex texts. Features deep technical integration with Vector databases and advanced AI semantic search.

projects.title: Agentic News Transformer
projects.description: Agentic AI news ecosystem built with Python
projects.longDescription: A fully automated ecosystem that leverages AI agents to curate, transform, and deliver news. Showcases advanced orchestration of Python-based AI agents for dynamic content generation.

projects.title: Gurduwara Langar Game
projects.description: Gamified Sikh heritage application for community impact
projects.longDescription: An interactive educational application designed to teach Sikh culture and the Langar tradition through gamification. Built as an impactful community ERG project.

projects.title: Ethereal Search Showcase
projects.description: Next-gen AI search experience visualization
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated frontend showcase demonstrating the capabilities of the Ethereal Search engine. Features an immersive UI exploring how AI can transform search and discovery.

projects.title: Artful Archives
projects.description: Creative digital preservation platform
projects.longDescription: A visually stunning website designed to archive and showcase creative artifacts. Built to emphasize aesthetics, smooth interactions, and performant delivery.

projects.title: Ethereal Explorer
projects.description: Immersive spatial computing experience on the web
projects.longDescription: A cutting-edge web application pushing the boundaries of 3D and spatial design in the browser. Showcases advanced WebGL and interactive web elements.

projects.title: Rosicrucian Parenting
projects.description: Full-stack parenting platform with iOS & Android apps
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive parenting platform built from the ground up, including a responsive website and native mobile apps for both iOS and Android. Features community resources and educational content.

projects.title: Rosicrucian Vowel Sounds
projects.description: Cross-platform Flutter app on App Store & Play Store
projects.longDescription: A beautifully crafted Flutter application published on both the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Guides users through vowel sound exercises with an intuitive, immersive audio experience.

projects.title: Hylios — Ethereal Dimension
projects.description: Published iOS game within the Ethereal Dimension universe
projects.longDescription: An immersive iOS gaming experience set in the Ethereal Dimension universe. Published on the App Store, Hylios blends storytelling with interactive gameplay and stunning visuals.

projects.title: Barricades — Austin Project
projects.description: Interactive narrative experience within Ethereal Dimension
projects.longDescription: An interactive storytelling experience exploring the Austin narrative within the Ethereal Dimension platform. Combines rich visual design with engaging interactive elements.

projects.title: Cycles of Fate
projects.description: Dynamic web experience exploring fate and destiny
projects.longDescription: A visually rich web application exploring themes of fate, cycles, and destiny through interactive design and engaging animations. Deployed on Vercel.

projects.title: Geometric Graph Design
projects.description: Stunning generative geometric visualizations
projects.longDescription: A generative art application that creates stunning geometric graph designs using mathematical algorithms. Showcases creative coding and data visualization techniques.

projects.title: Voice Practice Hub
projects.description: Audio-powered voice training and practice platform
projects.longDescription: An interactive voice training platform designed for guided vocal practice sessions. Features audio playback, progress tracking, and structured lesson plans.

projects.title: Audio Dialogues
projects.description: Interactive audio conversation experience
projects.longDescription: A unique web application for interactive audio-based dialogues. Combines AI and audio processing to create engaging conversational experiences.

projects.title: My4Blocks
projects.description: Block-based interactive web experience
projects.longDescription: A creative block-based interactive web application exploring modular design and component composition. Built with modern web technologies and deployed on Vercel.

projects.title: Blog Layouts for Artful Archives
projects.description: Design system and layout concepts for creative blogging
projects.longDescription: A collection of beautifully designed blog layout concepts created for the Artful Archives brand. Showcases typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy for content-first design.

projects.title: ARon — AI Fitness Coach
projects.description: HackZurich 2021 — AR fitness coach with real-time pose detection
projects.longDescription: Built at HackZurich 2021, ARon uses CreateML and ARKit for real-time body pose detection during workouts, achieving 93% ML accuracy in under 24 hours. Integrated Garmin wearables for biometric tracking.

projects.title: Carly — AR Car Visualizer
projects.description: HackZurich 2018 — AR car customization & visualization tool
projects.longDescription: Created at HackZurich 2018, Carly is a voice-controlled AR car configurator combining real-time 3D rendering with Credit Suisse financial API integration for smart vehicle purchasing decisions.

projects.title: Legal Lunatics
projects.description: HackZurich 2023 — Legal tech solution for Implenia workshop challenge
projects.longDescription: Built at HackZurich 2023 for the Implenia workshop challenge. A legal-tech project built with the gang — Wael, Thuong, Roman, and Jan. Tackled construction industry legal workflows with AI-powered automation.

projects.title: Drone Search & Rescue
projects.description: MLH Prime 2017 — 1st Place Winner at Bloomberg London
projects.longDescription: 1st Place at MLH Prime Europe Regional (Bloomberg, London). Used DJI drones with IBM Watson facial recognition to autonomously locate stranded people in disaster scenarios, sending precise GPS coordinates via SMS using Twilio. Built in Swift with DJI SDK, IBM Watson, AWS, and Node.js.
